10.name: Bouira
10.tagline: Mountain soul with a quiet heart.
10.description: You are deep, thoughtful, and love your roots. You prefer a slow pace and meaningful connections over the busy city rush.
10.vibe_tag: Green hills and serene highland air

11.name: Tamanrasset
11.description: You are a traveler at heart. With your love for art, deep traditions, and epic landscapes, you're basically the coolest person anyone knows.
11.vibe_tag: Heart of the desert, majestic peaks

12.name: Tébessa
12.description: You're a total time traveler who loves mixing the old-school with the new. You're sharp, strategic, and always have a story to tell.
12.vibe_tag: Ancient stones and frontier desert tales

13.name: Tlemcen
13.tagline: The artsy soul with timeless aesthetic vibes.
13.description: You are the definition of 'old money' aesthetic meets creative genius. You love slow mornings, historical architecture, and finding beauty in the little details of life.

14.name: Tiaret
14.tagline: Main character energy for horse lovers only.
14.description: You’re low-key, grounded, and have a deep appreciation for heritage. You prefer wide open spaces and the company of your best friends over the noise of the big city.
14.vibe_tag: Highland plains and wild equestrian spirit

15.name: Tizi Ouzou
15.tagline: Big mountain energy and fierce cultural pride.
15.description: You are the loyal friend who always stands up for what they believe in. Your vibe is all about community, steep hills, and having the best stories to tell.

16.name: Algiers
16.tagline: The chaotic, iconic center of everything cool.
16.description: You are the life of the party and thrive in the fast lane. You’re always on the move, chasing the latest trends and soaking up the busy city lights.
16.vibe_tag: The White City, sparkling by the sea

17.name: Djelfa
17.tagline: Steppe vibes and authentic desert-edge mystery.
17.description: You’re a rugged individual who thrives in the quiet, vast landscapes. You value tradition and keeping it real over chasing the latest internet fads.

18.name: Jijel
18.tagline: Coastal aesthetic and pure vacation mode.
18.description: You are the ultimate 'beach bum' who just wants to chill and enjoy the view. You keep things simple, breezy, and effortlessly cool.
18.vibe_tag: Coastal cliffs and wild blue waters

19.name: Sétif
19.tagline: Total hustle culture in a student city.
19.description: You’re ambitious, social, and always looking for the next big opportunity. Whether you're studying or shopping, you’re always busy leveling up.
19.vibe_tag: High altitude charm, vibrant city life

20.name: Saïda
20.tagline: Low-key mountain retreat for true peace.
20.description: You’re the friend everyone goes to when they need to escape the drama. You value quality time, fresh air, and a quiet, traditional way of life.
20.vibe_tag: Thermal springs and lush green valleys

21.name: Skikda
21.tagline: Industrial grit meets beautiful turquoise shores.
21.description: You’ve got a tough exterior but a soft spot for beauty. You’re hardworking and practical, but never say no to a sunset at the beach.

22.name: Sidi Bel Abbès
22.tagline: Historic plains city with major brain power.
22.description: You’re a mix of old-school history and modern student life. You’re smart, steady, and have a unique perspective on where you come from.
22.vibe_tag: Modern energy meets classic desert charm

23.name: Annaba
23.tagline: Classic Mediterranean vibes with a historic edge.
23.description: You’re charming, historic, and effortlessly cool. You love a balance of beach days, late-night cafes, and hanging out with your favorite people.
23.vibe_tag: The pearl of the Mediterranean coast

24.name: Guelma
24.tagline: Thermal spa vibes for the ultimate relaxer.
24.description: You are all about self-care and finding your zen. You’re low-key obsessed with wellness and love exploring nature at your own pace.
24.vibe_tag: Rolling hills and ancient thermal baths

25.name: Constantine
25.tagline: Living life on the edge, literally.
25.description: You are the intellectual powerhouse with a flair for the dramatic. You love deep convos, iconic views, and being the center of the cultural scene.

26.name: Médéa
26.description: You're the friend who prefers a cozy weekend over a wild party. You appreciate the simple things like good food and peaceful mountain views.

27.name: Mostaganem
27.description: You are all about that effortless Mediterranean lifestyle. You love the ocean breeze and keeping things relaxed while enjoying your daily routine.

28.name: M'Sila
28.tagline: The quiet achiever of the plains.
28.description: You’re steady, reliable, and always evolving. You don't need the spotlight to get things done, and you're perfectly happy in your own space.
28.vibe_tag: Heart of the plains, golden energy

29.name: Mascara
29.tagline: Rooted in history, rich in soul.
29.description: You have a deep respect for your roots and a strong personality. You’re proud, historic, and carry a certain timeless wisdom with you.

30.name: Ouargla
30.description: You’re ambitious and thrive in high-energy environments. You love blending ancient traditions with a modern, fast-paced professional life.
30.vibe_tag: Gateway to the golden desert sands

31.name: Oran
31.tagline: The life of the party, always.
31.description: You are the definition of cosmopolitan. With your love for music, nightlife, and social scenes, you’re the friend everyone invites to the main event.
31.vibe_tag: Radiating coastal energy and sunny vibes

32.name: El Bayadh
32.tagline: Gateway to the vast desert horizon.
32.description: You’re a bit of a mystery who values tradition and the open road. You’re grounded and keep things real, always looking toward the next adventure.
32.vibe_tag: High plateau winds and open skies

33.name: Illizi
33.description: You are a total explorer with a soul for discovery. You prefer breathtaking landscapes and quiet, profound connections over city noise.

34.name: Bordj Bou Arréridj
34.tagline: Innovating the future, one step ahead.
34.description: You’re tech-savvy, fast-moving, and always working on a new project. You’re the friend who’s always got the latest gadget and big plans.

35.name: Boumerdès
35.description: You’re the perfect balance of student energy and coastal chill. You love being close to the action while keeping your life balanced and fun.
35.vibe_tag: Where the sea kisses the forest

36.name: El Tarf
36.description: You’re the ultimate nature lover who finds peace in forests and lakes. You’re quiet, observant, and prefer a hike over a city street.
36.vibe_tag: Wild nature and hidden coastal gems

37.name: Tindouf
37.tagline: Tindouf: The ultimate rugged desert explorer.
37.description: You are the definition of resilient and mysterious. You thrive in the deep silence of the Sahara where the stars are your only company.

38.name: Tissemsilt
38.description: You’re all about those quiet, slow-paced vibes. You love a good sweater, a hot drink, and keeping things super low-key.
38.vibe_tag: Quiet plains and rugged mountain paths

39.name: El Oued
39.tagline: El Oued: The aesthetic dome-dwelling dreamer.
39.description: You have an eye for unique architecture and love the desert heat. You're deeply connected to your roots and the sweet taste of home.
39.vibe_tag: City of a thousand domes, sandy

40.name: Khenchela
40.tagline: Khenchela: Fierce, cold, and totally authentic.
40.description: You’re proud of your heritage and you don’t let the cold weather stop you. You’re tough, loyal, and love being surrounded by nature.
40.vibe_tag: Rugged cliffs and ancient Berber roots

41.name: Souk Ahras
41.tagline: Souk Ahras: A historic soul in the mountains.
41.description: You’re an old soul who loves stories from the past. Living near the border, you’re always curious about the world beyond.

42.name: Tipaza
42.tagline: Tipaza: Sun, sea, and ancient vibes.
42.description: You live for the golden hour and beach days. You’re a total tourist magnet because your aesthetic is literally legendary.
42.vibe_tag: Roman ruins by the turquoise sea

43.name: Mila
43.description: You’re low-maintenance but deeply fascinating. You’re the friend everyone goes to when they need a calm, thoughtful conversation.
43.vibe_tag: Ancient walls and deep valley secrets

44.name: Aïn Defla
44.tagline: Aïn Defla: The grounded, chill agricultural pro.
44.description: You’re balanced and down-to-earth. You enjoy the simple life and know exactly how to make things grow and thrive.

45.name: Naâma
45.tagline: Naâma: Steppe vibes and wild horizons.
45.description: You’re a free spirit who loves open spaces. You’re a bit of an outsider, but that’s exactly what makes you so cool.

46.name: Aïn Témouchent
46.tagline: Aïn Témouchent: Coastal chic and vineyard dreams.
46.description: You’re sophisticated, relaxed, and definitely the one with the best taste. You know how to enjoy the finer things without overdoing it.

47.name: Ghardaïa
47.tagline: Ghardaïa: Iconic, spiritual, and totally unique.
47.description: You’re one of a kind and everyone knows it. You take pride in your traditions and have a style that nobody can replicate.
47.vibe_tag: Geometric wonders in the desert sun

48.name: Relizane
48.tagline: Relizane: Growing fast and staying real.
48.description: You’re ambitious and always on the move. You’re building your future while staying connected to your roots in the plains.

49.name: Timimoun
49.tagline: The red oasis where aesthetic dreams live.
49.description: You are the main character of a desert indie film. With your stunning red mud-brick aesthetic and chill vibes, you turn every sunset into a core memory.
49.vibe_tag: Red oasis dreams in golden sands

50.name: Bordj Badji Mokhtar
50.tagline: The ultimate frontier vibe for true explorers.
50.description: You are mysterious, resilient, and totally off the grid. You thrive where the map ends and the real adventure begins.
50.vibe_tag: Deep desert silence and starlit skies

51.name: Ouled Djellal
51.tagline: Keepin' it real in the golden palms.
51.description: You are grounded, hardworking, and deeply connected to your roots. Life is simple, sweet, and centered around family gatherings.
51.vibe_tag: Rising oasis in the vast desert

52.name: Béni Abbès
52.tagline: A white oasis straight out of Pinterest.
52.description: You are the aesthetic friend who knows all the best photo spots. You keep things classy and serene, perfect for a peaceful getaway.
52.vibe_tag: Gateway to the infinite Sahara sands

53.name: In Salah
53.tagline: Built different in the heart of heat.
53.description: You are a powerhouse of energy and industry. Tough, resilient, and always focused on the bigger picture, you don't let the heat slow you down.
53.vibe_tag: Where the desert meets the sky

54.name: In Guezzam
54.tagline: The desert nomad with a global soul.
54.description: You are the ultimate bridge between worlds. Cultural, open-minded, and always on the move, you represent the true spirit of the Sahara.
54.vibe_tag: Borderland spirit in the deep south

55.name: Touggourt
55.tagline: Huge oasis energy, low key vibes.
55.description: You are the bustling heartbeat of the palm groves. You have a little bit of everything and always make everyone feel right at home.

56.name: Djanet
56.description: You are breathtaking and iconic. People travel from all over just to catch a glimpse of your legendary natural beauty.

57.name: El Meghaier
57.tagline: Cool, calm, and collected in the dunes.
57.description: You are the definition of 'low-key.' You don't need a crowd to be happy—just good dates and quiet desert nights.
57.vibe_tag: Oasis life in the golden dunes

58.name: El Meniaa
58.tagline: The perfect crossroads for your next chapter.
58.description: You are the ultimate connector. You bridge the north and south, balancing tradition with a forward-looking mindset.
58.vibe_tag: Ancient paths in the desert heart

59.name: Aflou
59.tagline: Mountain air and cozy sweater vibes.
59.description: You are the refreshing escape from the heat. You love high altitudes, snowy winters, and a cozy, traditional mountain lifestyle.

60.name: Barika
60.tagline: Keeping it steady on the plains.
60.description: You are reliable and down-to-earth. You represent the hardworking spirit of the plains, where life is steady and community comes first.
60.vibe_tag: Heart of the plains, vibrant spirit

61.name: Ksar Chellala
61.tagline: The quiet soul of the high plains.
61.description: You are the definition of low-key and authentic. You love keeping things traditional and appreciate the slow, steady rhythm of life away from the big city noise.

62.name: Messaad
62.tagline: Your gateway to the vast desert horizon.
62.description: You are grounded, resilient, and deeply connected to your roots. You’ve got a rugged spirit and prefer the wide-open spaces of the Saharan edge over anything else.

63.name: Aïn Oussara
63.tagline: The rising star of the plains.
63.description: You are focused, ambitious, and always on the move. You’re building your future and don’t have time for anything that doesn't help you level up.

64.name: Boussaâda
64.tagline: Where art and desert magic collide.
64.description: You’re an absolute creative soul with a poetic vibe. You love beautiful things, hidden gems, and the kind of aesthetic that looks perfect on your feed.
64.vibe_tag: Gateway to the Sahara's golden gate

65.name: El Abiodh Sidi Cheikh
65.tagline: Keep it sacred, keep it real.
65.description: You have a deep respect for history and traditions that have lasted for centuries. You aren't into trends—you care about what actually matters.

66.name: El Kantara
66.description: You are the bridge between two worlds, and everyone notices your unique style. You live for epic views and documenting the beauty around you.
66.vibe_tag: Gateway to the canyon's grand beauty

67.name: Bir El Ater
67.description: You’re built for the grind and thrive in environments that require grit. You’re definitely not a softie, and you love being in the heart of the action.
67.vibe_tag: Frontier spirit in the desert sun

68.name: Ksar El Boukhari
68.tagline: Old school vibes in the mountains.
68.description: You have an 'old soul' energy that people find super comforting. You love classic aesthetics, mountain air, and keeping your inner circle close.
68.vibe_tag: Ancient trade routes and mountain air

69.name: El Aricha
69.tagline: Total main character, off the grid.
69.description: You don't need anyone's validation to know you're cool. You prefer peace, quiet, and staying completely away from the drama of the fast lane.
69.vibe_tag: High plateau charm and open roads

01.name: Adrar
01.tagline: Living that golden oasis dream life.
01.description: You are the ultimate hidden gem, chilling in the middle of the dunes. You love keeping it real, traditional, and totally low-key.
01.vibe_tag: Golden dunes and ancient desert whispers

02.name: Chlef
02.description: You are all about growth and keeping things grounded. You're a hardworking soul who values community and simple, honest living.
02.vibe_tag: Where history meets the fertile valley

03.name: Laghouat
03.tagline: The gateway to your next adventure.
03.description: You are the bridge between the city and the wild Sahara. You've got a classic soul and you're always ready for a road trip.
03.vibe_tag: Gateway to the vast Saharan horizon

04.name: Oum El Bouaghi
04.description: You don't need the spotlight to shine. You value your peace and quiet, and you're the most reliable friend in the group.
04.vibe_tag: High plateau spirit, rugged and raw

05.name: Batna
05.description: You are a total history buff with a revolutionary spirit. You love hanging out with friends and debating the big topics.
05.vibe_tag: Mountain peaks and ancient Roman echoes

06.name: Béjaïa
06.description: You are the total package—beach days in the morning and mountain hikes in the afternoon. You're trendy, social, and always on the move.

07.name: Biskra
07.tagline: Sweetest vibes in the desert sun.
07.description: You are vibrant, warm, and have a heart of gold—just like the famous dates you're known for. You're the life of the oasis.
07.vibe_tag: Date palms and desert oasis magic

08.name: Béchar
08.tagline: Rugged, raw, and ready for anything.
08.description: You're a bit of a mystery. You love your independence and have a tough-as-nails personality that survives any challenge.

09.name: Blida
09.tagline: City of roses and main character energy.
09.description: You are super stylish and always surrounded by beauty. You're the one who organizes the weekend hangouts and keeps the squad together.
09.vibe_tag: City of roses and mountain breezes
